meaning: n.基础,基本,根据,主要成分(或要素),(认识论中的)基本原则或原理
examples: The basis of a good marriage is trust.
Education is the basis of a democratic society.
Pay is reviewed on a yearly basis.
Noble says he used these lush harmonies as a basis for The Outsiders Are Back.
The coupon is 3.63%, which is 67 basis points less than that of an equivalent Treasury.
